context: Agent produces correct script invocations for a two-run evidence capture session with identical conditions enforcement.

checklist.name: Correct baseline capture command
checklist.description: evidence-capture-plan.md contains a capture-evidence.sh invocation with 'baseline' label and a named output directory (e.g. ./baseline).

checklist.name: Correct changed capture command
checklist.description: evidence-capture-plan.md contains a capture-evidence.sh invocation with 'changed' label referencing http://localhost:4200 and a separate output directory.

checklist.name: Correct compare command
checklist.description: evidence-capture-plan.md contains a compare-evidence.sh invocation referencing both output directories and producing a comparison output file.

checklist.name: Identical conditions checklist
checklist.description: The document lists at least 4 conditions that must match between runs: URL, viewport size, seed data, and build mode.

checklist.name: Unexpected differences handling
checklist.description: The document describes the 3-step response to unexpected comparison differences: verify conditions, check for flaky elements, re-capture both runs.
